value.body:
## Context

Saved views exist as contracts and API endpoints, but users need a UI to create and maintain them without editing raw data.

## Outcome

Users can create, edit, duplicate, archive, and apply saved views with a structured filter/sort/group/column builder.

## Acceptance criteria

- View builder supports repository, status, type, priority, assignee, label, text, parent, archived, and stale filters where supported.
- Users can configure sort order, grouping mode, visible columns, and default display mode.
- Saved view changes immediately update issue list and board surfaces.
- Invalid view definitions are rejected with field-level messages.
- Tests cover create, update, archive, and applying a view.

frontmatter.title: Add a saved view builder for filters, sorting, grouping, and columns

value.title: Add a saved view builder for filters, sorting, grouping, and columns
